questions.question: What is the primary function of a mapping function in cache memories?
questions.hint: A mapping function is used to map virtual addresses to physical addresses.

questions.question: A cache memory has a 2:1 set associativity. If 16 sets are available, how many tags and ways will be used?
questions.hint: To calculate the number of tags and ways, multiply the number of sets by the number of ways per set.

questions.question: Describe the difference between a direct mapping and a set-associative mapping in cache memories.
questions.hint: Explain the advantages and disadvantages of each type of mapping function.
